title: Operator console + Killinchu globe
thesis: Operators need a live, provenance-linked view; the Cesium globe renders tracks + own-fleet with signed-receipt links.
script: Open the operator console UDS panes + Killinchu /globe. Live telemetry traces; each entity links to its signed Khipu receipt. Mobile-first degrade to a 2D map panel.
expected_output: Globe with drone entities + geofence overlays; click -> /khipu/verify receipt.
fallback: Static screenshot of the globe + a verified receipt JSON.
disclaimer: WE SENSE. WE EVIDENCE. WE DO NOT JACK INTO THIRD-PARTY DRONES. Passive sensing + evidence only; offensive action is the lawful customer's responsibility. See /api/killinchu/v2/legal.
